answer:
Betty experiences a fugue state and escapes into the fantasy of the soap opera *A Reason to Love*, assuming the identity of a nurse character. This dissociation allows her to block out the reality of her husband's murder and function in a delusional world. She remains in this state until she sees the inner workings of the television set, which snaps her back to reality.

\boxed{\text{Betty enters a fugue state and assumes the identity of a soap opera nurse character to escape the trauma.}}
